species.name: Unathi
species.description: A heavily reptilian species, Unathi hail from the Uuosa-Eso system. A relatively recent addition to the galactic stage, they suffered immense turmoil after the cultural and economic disruption following first contact with humanity. With their homeworld of Moghes suffering catastrophic climate change from a nuclear war in the recent past, the Izweski Hegemony that rules the majority of the species struggles to find its place in the galaxy. They hold ideals of honesty, virtue, martial combat, and spirituality above all else.
